image.alt: Painted portrait of a Russian empress in an elaborate crown and formal gown

rounds.revealFact: Catherine the Great ruled the Russian Empire for over three decades, expanding its territory and influence.

image.alt: Illustration of a fortified island city under siege by canoes and soldiers on causeways

clues: A besieging force cut off food and fresh water to an island capital reachable only by causeways.
Disease weakened the defenders more than any weapon the attackers brought.

events.label: Much of Rome burns during the reign of Emperor Nero
The Council of Nicaea establishes core Christian doctrine
The Byzantine Empire reaches its greatest extent under Justinian I
Genghis Khan unites the Mongol tribes under his rule

image.alt: Abandoned apartment buildings among overgrown trees, with a large containment structure visible in the distance

attribution.fileTitle: File:Chernobyl nuclear disaster aftermath abandoned town of Pripyat 02.jpg
attribution.author: Hnapel

rounds.prompt: The last Western Roman emperor, Romulus Augustulus, is deposed.
rounds.revealFact: This event is traditionally used to mark the fall of the Western Roman Empire and the start of the medieval period in Europe.

rounds.prompt: Where did Buddhist monks build one of history's first great residential universities?
rounds.revealFact: Nalanda operated as one of the world's first residential universities, drawing scholars from across Asia for centuries before its destruction in the 1190s.
